name: foaf-maker-inverse-declared
query: PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/> ASK WHERE { foaf:maker <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#inverseOf> foaf:made }

name: foaf-homepage-subproperties-declared
query: PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/> ASK WHERE { foaf:homepage <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subPropertyOf> foaf:page, foaf:isPrimaryTopicOf }
